subcodes.title: Words to a visitor, spoken on 1913-05-09
subcodes.first_line: Under all circumstances, I am happy and well.  I am never unwell.  The body of man is the result of the composition of the elements and these elements are constantly at war with each other.
subcodes.subjects: @composition and decomposition, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @relationship of the soul to the body
